insight: ChatControl's Discord integration requires the DiscordSRV plugin. Users must disable DiscordSRV's built-in chat relay by setting `DiscordChatChannelMinecraftToDiscord: false` in DiscordSRV's `config.yml`, otherwise messages get duplicated. ChatControl checks this on startup and logs a warning if it's still enabled (see ChatControl.java line ~247).

Users sometimes put `/chc a image ...` command text as the `Message:` value in format files (e.g. motd.yml), expecting it to execute the command and render an image. The `Message:` key in format parts only displays text — it never executes commands. To display images in formats, use the `Image_File`, `Image_Head`, or `Image_Url` keys on the format part instead (with `Image_Height` to control size). The `/chc a image` command is only for direct console/in-game one-time broadcasts.
